audience_policies.source_phrase: Pass allows one free admission. This is a coupon pass and can be picked up at the Library up to 1 week in advance. You do not need to return this pass. You save by using this pass! Admission without this pass is: Adults: $15.00 Seniors (65+): $13.00 Children (3-12 years): $11.00
